narrative:
Trenton 8 (precinct in Butler County) has 1,385 registered voters, with 62.4% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 26.1% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 11.6%, a pronounced Republican lean of 14.5 percentage points.
